summary: Completed testing of Documentary Instructions (DI) page enhancements. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend features verified working correctly. Port dropdown shows 'Name, Country' format, surveyor label changed to 'Buyer Surveyor at Load Port', new read-only 'Seller Surveyor at Load Port' field auto-populates from contract.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ports returns ports with name, type, country fields
Backend: Discharge ports include Turkish ports (Türkiye)
Backend: GET /api/trades returns trades with sellerSurveyor field
Backend: POST /api/doc-instructions/ creates DI with sellerSurveyor field
Backend: POST /api/doc-instructions/ auto-populates sellerSurveyor from trade when not provided
Backend: GET /api/surveyors returns surveyors list for dropdown
Frontend: Port dropdown shows 'Name, Country' format (e.g., 'Samsun, Türkiye', 'Alexandria, Egypt')
Frontend: Label changed from 'Surveyor at Load Port' to 'Buyer Surveyor at Load Port'
Frontend: New 'Seller Surveyor at Load Port' label visible in dialog
Frontend: Seller surveyor input field is read-only
Frontend: Seller surveyor auto-populates when contract is selected (e.g., 'General Survey')
Frontend: Preview section shows both 'Buyer Surveyor at Load Port' and 'Seller Surveyor at Load Port' labels
Frontend: Edit mode loads sellerSurveyor field correctly
critical_code_review_comments: DocInstructionsPage.js correctly implements all 3 requested enhancements
Port dropdown uses Map to deduplicate and format as 'Name, Country'
handleTradeSelect function properly auto-populates sellerSurveyor from trade
Seller surveyor input has readOnly attribute and bg-muted/50 styling for visual distinction
Backend doc_instructions.py correctly includes sellerSurveyor in both Create and Update Pydantic models
Backend auto-populates sellerSurveyor from trade if not provided during creation
Email template updated to show both Buyer and Seller surveyors
seed_data_creation: Test DIs created and cleaned up during backend and frontend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: DI page enhancements complete. Port dropdown shows 'Name, Country' format. Surveyor label is now 'Buyer Surveyor at Load Port'. New read-only 'Seller Surveyor at Load Port' field auto-populates from trade.sellerSurveyor when contract is selected. Preview and email template show both surveyor fields.
